headline: Robinhood CTO Exit Puts Spotlight On New Event Contract Expansion
summary: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) announced the departure of longtime Chief Technology Officer Jeffrey Pinner. The company also introduced user-accessible, regulated event contracts, giving retail investors a way to trade on outcomes in prediction markets. Robinhood’s stock, NasdaqGS:HOOD, trades at $76.28, with a 4.7% gain over the past week and 9.5% over the past month. The shares are up 41.1% over the past year, while year-to-date performance shows a 33.8% decline, highlighting how...
